reviews.text: Find a better lawyer. Be picky
Second time going thru Safa!!! She's great I'll only consider going thru her and highly recommend she knows what's best. She gets things done!!!
Safa has represented me several times. I have and will continue to refer her.
She is really good professional and friendly

Ms. Hodges was absolutely incredible from the beginning all the way to the end . Her communication and knowledge were second to none . I am so incredibly grateful for the dedication and determination that she gave to my case .. I can’t recommend her enough !!!!  She made the whole process so much less painful.. always made sure I was comfortable and felt protected ! Thank you again Safa!!

This is my second time working with Safa Hodge and Lulu. I love how they are readily dedicated to their clients and how attentive they’re to answering your questions and staying on top of everything. This duo goes above and beyond working for you. I appreciate the both them and I am glad I chose their office. You will not be disappointed.
Always cares about her clients more than just a business relationship.  Her staff and expertise is above and beyond anything I have ever experienced.

My Attorney Ms. Safa Hodges truly took the initiative to look into my case & the results shocked me! I can truly say that the level of care provided when it came down to the representation & satisfaction of her client was truly STELLAR! I cannot thank you enough Ms. Hodges, my life would not have been the same without your assistance. My life would have been non-existent & I truly thank you once again! RESULTS DRIVEN, MORE THAN 5 STARS DESERVED. Bravo!!! Robert H. Jr
The best

The Law Office of Foroozandeh provided exceptional service from start to finish. Their team was professional, attentive, and truly dedicated to achieving the best outcome for my situation. They took the time to explain every step of the process, answered all of my questions promptly, and made sure I felt supported the entire way through.

What impressed me most was their combination of expertise and compassion. They not only fought hard on my behalf but also treated me with respect and understanding, which made a challenging experience much easier to navigate.

Mr. Majid Foroozandeh is one of the most honest and kind attorneys I have ever spoken with. I reached out to him with a legal question, and although I was not his client, he still took the time to listen carefully, explain the situation clearly.

He truly cares about people, and it shows. We need more professionals like him. I am very grateful and highly recommend Mr. Foroozandeh to anyone looking for a trustworthy and compassionate lawyer.
Professional lawyers and excellent service!

Mr. Pace is the best attorney I know he has been my attorney for over 25 years. He makes every case easy and stress free.
I highly recommend him.
His very honest lawyer. 2 times he help me. His 10+.
Very honest and professional. Doesn't delegate the work to secretaries very Hands on I appreciate the attention to details. 10 out of 10 highly recommend
He is such a professional lawyer. He is very focused and organized. He knows what he is doing.
One of the best accident lawyers ive dealt with

He is a great Attorney someone who you can trust and settles your case  ASAP.  I already recommended people to him.
.

Alan Pace is a great,caring, reliable, honest, up front attorney. I value that he's such a humble family oriented man and is family operated firm.His work ethic and professionalism is very high standardized. I would highly recommend his law firm; he helped me with a car accident case and won the case. I recommend people I know that need help with personal injury, bankruptcy; etc. Thanks Alan!

I can’t recommend Valentine Law Group enough!  They represented me in a very emotional case involving the death of my elderly mother with dementia.  They were so caring and kind throughout the process, yet thorough, detailed and professional.  Every attorney I dealt with was very responsive and just wonderful to work with.  Thank you so much, Valentine Law Group!!!  I am forever grateful!

My family and I very, carefully, interviewed many Attorneys for the death of my husband.  The choice of Kim Valentine and her incredible team was the best decision we made as they treated us with kid gloves while being fierce advocates that got my husband justice in a difficult case.
I, highly, recommend her law firm!

I spoke to Travis Siegel,  regarding a possible case against a Rehabilitation/Nursing Home that neglected my Mom. Even though the case would have been difficult or unlikely to win, Travis took the time to listen to my story. He was compassionate and respectful about my situation and if there would have been a chance to hold them accountable I would have felt as though I was in good hands with him.
I so grateful for the time he spent with me and now feel confident that at least I tried to hold them accountable. Thank you, Travis.

At my Attorney's suggestion, I attended an online seminar "Building a Winning Elder Abuse Case: Trial Preparation" presented by Kim Valentine. As a Litigation Paralegal of over 20 years in Delaware with more of a background in PI and now newly working on MM/NH cases. This seminar was more insightful than I could have anticipated. Kim covered a large amount of material in short period of time, but everything was easy to follow and comprehend as a result of the way it was presented. Throughout, Kim's presentation it was easy to see the honesty, compassion, and conviction in her words and expressions. One thing I will certainly take away from the seminar is what we are doing is good and sadly it is not a level playing field. Kim is leveling the field and trying to bring all of us with her. Thank you and I will not hesitate to reach out to her firm or refer someone in need to her firm.

Although I do wish we never needed this type of services; I’m glad to have used Valentine. We worked with Travis. He did an awesome job. I didn’t need to call him for anything unless I desired to.  It was little to no stress to me while Travis worked in the background. He handled both the family and court drama.  Travis would  call every once in a while to update us as needed. I never felt the need to chase him down. When the final days came to be, Kim joined in. They both were great. I hope no one ever has to use them or anyone else but if/when you do, I would 100% recommend this group to handle these matters with little to no impact/stress on your normal day to day.

Upon seeking legal counsel for my grandmother's negligence case, my family and I engaged Valentine Law Group.  Their professionalism and compassionate understanding of our situation guided us expertly through the litigation process.  As a result of their diligent work, my grandmother received the justice she deserved, ensuring her memory endures.  We extend our sincere gratitude to Valentine Law Group.

I have been around many lawyers for different reasons over the years but I have never been treated with as much respect as I have been treated by Valentine Law Group.  They always had time to explain things to me and answer all my questions regardless of how good or bad the questions were.  I can guarantee the next time I need a lawyer, this is the first call I would make.

I can’t say enough about our positive experience with the Valentine Law Group.  They proved to be smart, persistent, and tenacious in representing our family in our case.  They listened very well to our situation, and through their intensive discoveries, were able to find a successful path for our case.  We are extremely grateful for their efforts and could not be more enthusiastic in recommending them for anyone else pursuing justice.
They took my mom's case when other law firms wouldn't. They worked fast to get a good result for my mom and I'm extremely happy with the work they did.
Great people

We had the privilege of working with Kim Valentine and her team.  No one really wants to resort to hiring a Personal Injury Attorney, but if you find yourself in that place, I would highly recommend using her firm, Valentine Law Group.  Kim is passionate about her clients and finding justice for the victims.  We appreciated her candid answers to our questions, her honesty and reality checks when needed.  We always felt that she put our family and our best interests first.  Having said that, she is assertive, sometimes relentless at bringing a Company/Person to justice.  Consider working with her Team at Valentine Law Group, they are all professional and we felt comfortable and supported during a very emotionally difficult situation.  Thank you Kim, Susan, Kim J for all you do!

I am extremely grateful for Kim Valentine and the Valentine Law Group. From the moment they accepted our case, I knew we were in good hands. They kept us informed through every stage of the proceedings and worked diligently to get us a favorable settlement. I highly recommend the Valentine Law Group to anyone in need of legal representation!

The entire team at Valentine Law Group represents the best of the best. They are indisputably one of the best firms handling elder abuse cases in the country.  Kim Valentine is the attorney that other attorneys refer their cases to because of her dedication, her tenaciousness and her compassion.
She cares little for her clients and all about big money settlements.

I am a lawyer who has been referring cases and clients to VLG for years.   This group of lawyers is more dedicated to what they do than any group of lawyers I have seen.   They are "true believers" and really give their heart and soul to their cases and clients.    A truly amazing group of people.

This firm provides very specialized and individualized service.  They are very selective in the cases they take.  But if they take your case you will feel very fortunate.  They are as good as they come.

Wasted my time (3 months) , just to tell me they can't take my case. Made me get all medical records for my dad, when I thought that's what you hire a lawyer for. Than after that long, asked me to get ambulance records, even if they still haven't started reviewing the medical records because they are very busy. I asked how I even start to get those because I don't know. And, than was told to come pick up my records and that they can't take the case. I know they're busy, but I rather they wouldn't even have tried to take the case than to waste my time.
Professional law group that represents plaintiff. Proud to briefly got trained and work with the team,very supportive!
Jonathan is very helpful, friendly, professional and does what he says.
Professional, courteous, respectful, and knows his stuff! Finding a competant lawyer who you feel you can trust can be daunting, but I would recommend Jon to family and friends.

Jon is an amazing attorney. Ensured the best possible outcome in my case. Always had my best interest in mind and kept in constant communication. Thankful I chose the best representation. Highly recommend

Jonathan recently represented me on a personal injury case resulting from a motorcycle accident.  Being an accomplished attorney with a proven track record of success, he was able to get me a favorable settlement after negotiating with an insurance company that was being quite stubborn.

Jonathan’s knowledge of the law, his professionalism, his understanding of your needs, and his being very easy to get ahold of puts him at the very top of my referral list for anyone needing legal representation.

I was his client back in 2019 and he still responses me quickly when I ask for help with my case in 2013.

He’s the best lawyer I have ever met. If you have ever talked to him, you know what I mean.

He’s very responsible and knowledgeable. Choose him, you’ll find hope in your cases. Jonathan always makes sure his clients are taking good care of with their cases and responses their questions when they are concerned. Jonathan is trustable and experienced as well. For my case back in 2019, he patiently explained everything to me so that I understand what I should do at the court. He makes everything simply for clients to understand. Believe me, choose him, it will be your big release for your case.

Jonathan was a great lawyer from start to finish on my case. He was always in contact with me, updating me immediately when there were any updates in my case. He is very fair and will fight for you. I got the best possible outcome one could hope for with my case and that's because of Jon's hard work. I will definitely refer anyone in need to him. He is very experienced and dedicated to his clients!

Jonathan has been my lawyer for 2 years now. He has done an exceptional job with everything that has arised during this time. He has represented me in court and has been able to get the best deals from  the court system. He is very proper, professional and straightforward. I couldn’t be happier with his service and I highly recommend him to anyone, 10/10 stars.

Jon has definitely helped alot with my case especially during the pandemic. I couldn't imagine going through the whole process myself not to mention all the days i had court and didn't have to miss work because Jon took care of it.  My case started in 2018 here it is 2022 and we're finally about to reach the finish line. I recommend Jon as an attorney or even just legal advice.

I have had Jonathan as my personal Attorney and he was just amazing. Great communication, took care of things that needed to be without me having to run around much at all. He is definitely the person to go to and get help from. Highly recommended.

I retained Mr. Rapel for a case where I was charged with possession of a firearm by a felon. He stayed in contact with me through the entire process speaking to me personally not through other staff. He then got the judge to dismiss the charge to the frustration of the district attorney. He was fairly priced for a perfect solution.

I called Jon when I needed his help with some legal issues. He was very quick responsive and was able to meet with me the next day. The outcome exceeded my expectations and would and have recommended his firm to friends and family.

So. It’s been a year since I started a case with Orrin for a QDRO. He still is unable to get a response from a 401k provider. You would think this is a specialty of a QDRO lawyer but the world is full of surprises. Following up with him takes multiple follow ups over email and phone calls. He misses important and time sensitive emails which pushes out settlement dates. Miss places signed documents which also pushes out settlement dates. One of the worst experiences with a lawyer. Stay away.

He took my $750 to do a QDRO and stalled with useless excuses. Useless because he wasted MY time and KEPT the money. I did not get any resolution of my QDRO case.
He never completed the legal assignment for which he committed !!!!!!!!!!
My giving him one zero is too high of a rating.
He defrauded me and left me in deeper debt.
My EX (the bigger liar) is who benefited…
Weird since I am the one who hired him.
If you are looking for a divorce hopefully not he is the best
Rich is now deceased
Great front desk and customer service!! Knowledgeable attorneys and dedicated service. 10/10
Great lawyer to work with.  Highly effective!

Rich and his team are amazing and I am so grateful they represented me with my previous employer. They are dedicated, experienced and so passionate about law and work hard for you. There's nothing worse than being scared and someone coming after you and to have them make me feel at ease and be so knowledgeable really helped me sleep at night. I couldn't speak any higher of them and thankfully; they were on my team. Put your trust in them and you won't be disappointed!
Rich is a hard working kick ass lawyer.  He has incredible energy and wants to WIN!   I really love his enthusiasm and skill.  When you need a fighter in your corner, call Rich!

Rich is an excellent trial lawyer.  He has a steady flow of cases because he gets good results and lots of referrals.  He is honest and has decades of experience in the Orange County court system. I highly recommend Mr. Quintilone.

After working so hard for 4 years, we were able to settle my case and I'm pleased with the outcome.  Standing up for your rights is difficult but Quintilone and Associates made it a little easier!  Great research and support through the process.
Best team of lawyers i have dealt with.

Excellent attorney!  Rich helped us aggressively with a legal situation.  Have already recommended him to other friends.  Rich and his associates are sincere, prompt and always looking out for their client(s).  Will use Quintilone and Associates if a problem arises in the future.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Mr. Parlier. Glad we could assist with this case!

reviews.text: Quintilones and Associates were amazing. They were fast to respond and in 1 word 'Tenacious' in resolving my issue. They took the stress of dealing with it completely away and got it resolved.

From the moment this Army Veteran was referred to the Law Offices of Mann & Elias, thank you, Antoinette, I knew I was in capable hands. Facing a lawsuit against a large corporation felt incredibly daunting, but the team at Mann & Elias handled my case with unwavering professionalism, expertise, and genuine care.

Their meticulous attention to detail, thorough preparation, and strategic approach were truly impressive. They took the time to understand every nuance of my situation, explained complex legal concepts clearly and understandably, and kept me informed every step of the way. Communication was always prompt and transparent, which significantly eased my anxieties.

What truly sets Mann & Elias apart is their dedication and tenacity. They didn't back down against the immense resources of the opposing corporation. They fought tirelessly for my rights, demonstrating exceptional legal acumen and a relentless pursuit of justice.

Thanks to the exceptional representation of the Law Offices of Mann & Elias, I achieved a successful outcome beyond my expectations. They not only got me a financial settlement but also gave me invaluable peace of mind throughout the process. I am eternally grateful for their expertise, dedication, and unwavering support.

If you are facing a legal battle, especially against a large corporation, I wholeheartedly recommend the Law Offices of Mann & Elias. They are truly a 5-star firm that delivers results.
Imad and Hannah are the best. Quick replies and very helpful. Got the help I needed when others turned me away. Highly recommend.

I was referred to Mann & Elias and I'm so happy I reached out!  Imad Elias and his team were a pleasure to work with and made me feel like I was truly cared about as a person.  They were friendly, knowledgeable, compassionate, and explained every detail through each step of the process.  The always made me feel safe to ask any questions or concerns.  I highly recommend them!

Imad Elias in my personal and professional opinion is one of the best employment attorneys in the state of California.  This firm has the ability to handle complex cases while providing exceptional customer service to it's clients.  I highly recommend the law offices of Mann & Elias.

Imad did an excellent job with my case.  He is smart, listens well, is caring and honest.  Above all, he has great integrity.  His staff is professional and helpful.  I always was treated well whenever I called.  He is a tough negotiator, knows the law, gives excellent advice and has a great sense of humor.  I am so very thankful to Imad for all of his help.  In a very difficult situation, he gave me hope and great results.  I would highly recommend him!
Virginia Landry is amazing.  She is very thorough and there for you every step of the way.  Couldn't have made it without her and I'm so thankful.
Fabulous attorney. Kind, understanding, intelligent and experienced. Recommend her highly.
Virginia has been extremely honest and helpful. She goes the extra mile and she cares about people,  Her professional caring attitude is a rare commodity in the field of Law.
Virgina is a top notch Attorney. She helped me to get some of my counts dismissed and finally get my case expunged.
Virginia is very honest person and actually cares.   Great to work with
You won't find a better attorney than Virginia. Her and her team put their best efforts into your troubles

You won't be disappointed.
She gives 110%
Her knowledge, experience and skills are a necessity when society and today's world 🌎 are seen through the filter of honest truth.

Best DUI attorney in Orange County. She far exceeded my expectations. You can tell she cares about her clients. She’s strategic and relentless. If you want the best results possible, retain Virginia Landry.

WOW!!!!! Virginia Landry is an absolute professional who knows what she's talking about, but doesn't just talk, she is ALL ACTION. I was quite nervous as she was a referral and I'll have to say I'm so glad I was referred. Absolutly incredible and worth every penny spent. Her compassion is beyond my understanding especially in these times. I can't say enough other than HIRE HER NOW!!! You will NOT be dissapointed. A+++++++++
Best Attorney in Orange County. Great work as the DA and now serving the community!

My case was dismissed DUI ,due to her help. and I sincerely appreciate it. My case is finally over now. If you have any concerns or cases, and you need help but can't find a trusted lawyer, I highly recommend hiring Virginia. She was very detailed and meticulous on how she handled my case and I couldn't be any happier with the outcome!! She is excellent lawyer!Do not hesitate to contact her, and again I really appreciate her help!

DO NOT go to "the dui queen" she is terrible! Gave me the worst legal advice ever! Don't waste your money she did nothing to help my case & even made it worse. After she got my money I couldn't get a hold of her or get her to return my calls. I had a class A license & got a dui so I needed legal advice & some help so I followed what she said but her advice makes it incredibly hard to get my cdl back so I'm out of a job thanks for nothing viginia
Simply the best
Luxury service 5,5k and lack of final service
Great place great lawyers I love this place

I hired Virginia Landry's office in 2013 for my third DUI. They worked so hard and they gave me a piece of mind that is priceless. I was in custody and they took all my calls and answered all my questions. I don't know what I would have done if it weren't for them. They got me out of jail on a program called scram X which is basically home confinement with alcohol monitoring. When I got in trouble again in 2015 for my 4th and 5th DUI'S again I retained Virginia's office. Again I got taken into custody. Virginia's office works so hard and made me feel important and confident. Again they were able to take all my calls while I was in custody and never made me feel like I was imposing or like I was asking unnecessary questions. Everyone there is so nice. I had a chance to work with a lot of people there in the office. Meghan O'Brien Taylor is an amazing attorney she works hard and she fights for her clients, she's straight to the point very knowledgeable and honest. Betty Stroh is also an amazing attorney she has a very comforting quality about her, and that's what I needed while standing in an orange suit in a cage at court talking to the judge. Together they got me a deal that got me out of custody, got me help for my addiction and basically saved my life. The staff there at the office are like a team of angels Suzie Mendoza is the nicest lady you'll ever meet in your life she went out of her way to make me feel at ease while I was in that horrible place. Angelica Calderon was always there for me while I was in jail she was on the other end of the phone a lot of the time, and when it wasn't her it was Maritza Flores another angel of the Landry office. After i got out they would call me with reminders of court dates and deadlines, and would always remember me when I call. Queen Bee Virginia Landry really truly cares. It was just about a week ago on president's day 2016 the office was closed and I come to find out I had a warrant out for my arrest and had no idea why. I called the office and  got ahold of Virginia's after hours line. She answered and knew exactly who I was even after nearly a year, I told her about the warrant and she told me she would figure it out and call me back. She call me back very promptly and told me that it was just from some fines I failed to paid from a previous caseback in 2012. She told me to meet her at the court the next morning and we would take care of it and not to worry. Just hearing her say "don't worry" took all my anxiety away. Her confidence is very reassuring. When I got to the court she got it cleared up for me and answered all my questions and told me to call if I had anymore. I would recommend Virginia Landry's office to anyone who needs help with their legal case, they're an amazing and extremely competent legal team. THANK YOU ALL SO MUCH!

Attorney Betty Stroh was amazing. She resolved everything in 1 day and I was extremely satisfied with the outcome. Between Betty and the law offices administrative assistant Maritza Flores I always received communication about situational statuses and what to expect. I always felt that my situation was just as important as anyone else's. I would highly recommend them to anyone looking for council.
She has been very helpful to anyone living out of state and has the misfortune of getting a DUI in California.

This is my very first review ever since not a big review person and didn't think it was really necessary.  This time I have to go leave great review that this firm deserves.  I've been in my only business for over 15 years and doing pretty good business and had a chance to hire many attorney's for legal matters such as for contracts and for litigations and spent hundreds of thousands of dollars but never felt like they were worth the money.  But this time, I feel really good amount spending the money with this law firm.
They were a little more expensive than others but it was worth every penny.  They went beyond what anyone would do to make the case settled on my favor.  DMV messed up on my restricted license and young lady Carolyn at the office called all the dept at DMV and took her more than 4 hours and got on a call with me together with the right dept and got my restricted license that same day.
Also the attorney was able to get my class from 9 months to 3 months.  I always got a call back promptly and was always updated.  This is by far the best attorney experiences that I've had ever.  Don't worry and just work with them.  They will take good care of you!

Everyone that I have worked with at the office, Taura, Suzie, Meghan, Vivian, and Virginia have been the BEST. They have helped me every step of the way with this process. With every step of the way, I felt taken care of and informed. It was because of the professionalism and dedication of the staff at this office. If anyone were ever to get in a bind (hopefully you don't) I would definitely recommend this office, as they are knowledgable, dedicated, and committed to get you the best deal possible if you have been unluckily charged with a DUI.

After leaving a less than favorable relationship with my son's father and trying to navigate Family Law and the legal system on my own, I found myself completely bewildered. I was referred to The Hunter Law Group by a family friend and have been blown away by how amazing they have been to work with. Not only are they open and honest in their practices, they also empathetic, accommodating, and understanding. Every time I speak with them I feel at ease due to the security and trust they have built while working with them.
My whole situation has been a nightmare legally  but Dan Hunter and his staff have been a ray of light throughout the storm. I can't thank you guys enough.

It’s an understatement when I say Dan Hunter was capable and trustworthy during a very tough divorce process! I highly recommend you chose him to represent you…and then REST ASSURED that you have made a great choice! He was both collaborative and strategic in getting me the best possible outcome. Not to mention, he has an amazing staff that are well versed in law themselves and also professional and kind to lend an ear to my gripes from time to time.

Dan and his team are the best in the business! They did an outstanding job for me with my unusual and complicated divorce.  Dan would always make sure I understood every process along the way.  I would highly recommend The Hunter Law Group!

All the staff have been responsive and professional. They have each worked hard to help resolve issues in a timely way and have been great to answer my questions. Dan was honest and so helpful with several matters. Informed and competent.

I have been working with Dan Hunter for the past 4 years on an extremely complicated and trying series of cases. When I moved to Orange County in 2017, I was very concerned about finding an attorney to help with continued legal matters that had been ongoing for many years. Dan took the time to understand my case, the complex dynamics of my family, and has tirelessly worked to advocate for me and my children across multiple family matters. Dan always works with the best interests of the children in mind and at heart. I feel an enormous sense of relief knowing that I have Dan and his team supporting me as we navigate a system that seems to work very differently for different people. His advice and counsel have been incredibly valuable to me and the kindness, compassion, and empathy with which he approaches his clients and the very sensitive matters at hand, is truly remarkable. While managing through these legal matters is quite painful and difficult, I am comforted knowing that the Hunter Law Group is in my corner and that I can rely on them to help see me through every challenge we encounter. I highly recommend The Hunter Law Group to any individual or family in need of support in family law matters. Dan and his team are truly THE BEST at what they do.

The Hunter Law Group guided us through a very difficult divorce/child custody case with exceptional knowledge of the law, respect and compassion. Dan Hunter is  a very skilled professional and was readily available to hear our concerns. I could not imagine going through this ordeal without him. His experience with the law itself and the court system helped us navigate through this stressful situation.His staff too is excellent! I highly recommend The Hunter Law Group-if you are in need of a Family Law Professional.

When my husband left me , my adult daughter did some research and recommended I see Hunter Law Group to file for divorce.  Scared, nervous and without means, Dan and Meri walked me through this start to finish.  I cannot stress enough , the professional care was accompanied with emotional support of the highest order.  I will recommend them to anyone who needs this service, and be forever grateful for their assistance and service to their calling.

I have worked with Dan Hunter for about 4 years on a very complex and dynamic case.  The professionalism and accessibility of his office administration make it easy to be in contact with Mr. Hunter. Additionally, Mr. Hunter has a legal support team that is kind, informed and incredibly organized.  Our case started as a simple consultation over custody, which grew to a serious criminal/family law case.  I am so lucky to have had Mr. Hunter during this most terrible time in my life.  The family court system seems to be constructed in a very systematic way and Mr. Hunter understood every expectation, at every turn. He was always prepared himself, honest, forthright and concerned for our best interest and the best interest of my family.  I was able to receive a shoulder of a friend, as well as an attorney who knows the process through and through. Mr. Hunter always made himself available for a meeting to thoroughly discuss our case details, court proceedings or just time to put my nervous mind at ease. In this process, I have seen many opposing counsels in action, other attorney’s in their cases, none have had the balance of assertiveness, humility and knowledge as Mr. Hunter.  While our case was long and complex, it was a marathon and not a sprint, to which I was the prevailing party.  I would highly recommend Mr. Hunter for anybody seeking advice and counsel from a Family Law attorney.

Dan Hunter provided me with a fantastic mediation experience.  I found him to be fair and clearly working towards the good of both parties.  I have recommended Dan to other clients needing divorce representation and he has surpassed their expectations.   Dan is my first choice in OC law!

Mr. Hunter helped me through a very difficult divorce. My wife took off to Ohio with our son. Dan immediately went to court and got an order awarding me sole legal and sole physical custody. When my wife still refused to return, he started the process of reporting the matter to the District Attorney. My ex then immediately returned our son to Orange County. At trial, Mr. Hunter successfully prevented the move away and was able to get sanctions against my ex-wife. He and his staff were knowledgeable, courteous and responded promptly to all of my questions and requests. I am grateful he represented me throughout the process. He was truly my advocate at every turn.

-Kevin

Mr Hunter is a knowledgeable attorney that advised me appropriately through a complicated and sensitive case. He and his staff were attentive and thorough. I appreciate the way he represented me with honesty and integrity. Heidi

I met Dan during one of the hardest most stressful times of my life, when my marriage was falling apart and my kids were upset.  Dan was able to give me great legal advice and help me navigate a settlement that worked for my situation.  Dan was very compassionate, knowledgeable, and able to speak to me in a way that I could understand the complex issues with out making me feel worse.  He is a calm force, but also appropriately aggressive when necessary.  I was able to trust that my concerns were addressed in a competent and decent way.  Dan always follows through on what he promises and works with honesty and integrity.  The Hunter Law Group staff is friendly and helpful.  With Dan's assistance and advice I was able to achieve a fairly peaceful resolution. I will use The Hunter Law Group in the future when I need additional help with custody and support.

Update: This review was posted for my mom's case, she requested I post it because she doesn't have gmail account.

----

Highly incompetent. Extremely greedy; manipulative, dishonest and excessive billing. Morally bankrupt.

After one court proceeding, in which Dan was not able to defend me in any way, shape or form, I knew how incompetent he was and I terminated him as my attorney. During my retention of his services, I felt like his retainer was like a sieve, the money just vanished! It wasn't until I met a competent attorney that I fully realized the extent of Dan's dishonesty and incompetence.

Dan let my ex crucify my in court. At my trial, Dan just sat there and let my ex have everything. Not once did he ever say, “I object”. He whispered to me that he would appeal... I later learned you can’t appeal things you don’t object to.
I have been very impressed with this firm. They always call back and have been more than helpful through this hard time for me.

Corbett took my case on a few years ago, and at the time I was very fearfull of a bad outcome. The case has just settled and because of his experience and expertice, the outcome of my case turned out great and now I can move on with my life. HIGHLY recomment Corbett!
Bill is the best!! Period
Although you are unable to take my case I appreciate the links you have sent for me to continue my process.

Attorney Williams guided me through the legal process and gave me great assurance throughout this difficult time for me and my family. Corbett and his law office are very professional and have done a great job with my case. I've had multiple attorney's and he has surpassed them tremendously. Exceptional work! I would highly recommended Corbett and his staff.

I was still grappling to understand the nature of my problem but luckily they were patient and were willing to explain each viable solution - but also its consequences.

Last, but definitely not least, the team is smart, friendly and they will respond to emails/messages very quickly.  Suffice to say, after I consulted them, I had better control over my employment problem.
My experience with Corbett was excellent. He was very responsive, acted with urgency, and was able to achieve a favorable outcome for my case. I would highly recommend him!

Corbett did an oustanding job settling issues with My former employer, and was very diligent in answering phone calls and emails in a timely fashion. I was totally informed with every aspect of My case as it unfolded. He's an excellent attorney!

I'd definitely recommend Corbett Williams. He is smart, fair and easy to communicate with. A true professional. We were extremely impressed with the legal services, and would not hesitate to use the firm again.

reviews.text: I completely agree with the other reviews.  Mr. Beam was very rude and demeaning and dishonest when I spoke with him on the phone.  His secretary/clerk was also rude - it must be the office culture.  They put so much financial duress on our recently widowed client, threatening to have her and her grandchildren out on the streets in 48 hours if they even went before the judge to defend themselves, that she signed an agreement and handed over her complete back rent not knowing that every penny would just go to pay a portion of their exorbitant legal fees (which went from $280 to over $9,000 without any explanation or list of costs, despite being asked for a list).  We are filing a complaint with the CA bar!

I want to express my deep concern regarding GREGORY BEAM & ASSOCIATES and the alarming disregard shown towards the service they have sworn to uphold. It is profoundly troubling to witness the behavior that has emerged, characterized by manipulation and unethical practices that not only undermine their oath but also inflict harm on the most vulnerable members of our community.

Particularly alarming are the reports of bullying directed towards disabled senior citizens, which have resulted in the unjust removal of their homes. Such actions are not only reprehensible but also indicative of a systemic failure to prioritize the well-being of those who depend on support and protection. The allegations made against these individuals have been proven untrue, yet they continue to be used as tools for intimidation and coercion, all in the pursuit of monetary gain.

This pattern of behavior raises significant ethical questions about the values that guide GREGORY BEAM & ASSOCIATES.
It is vital that we hold those in positions of power accountable for their actions and ensure that they adhere to the principles of integrity and compassion that are the foundation of their roles.

I urge you to take immediate action to address these issues, reinforcing the commitment to serve rather than exploit, and to protect those who are most in need of advocacy and support

reviews.ownerResponse: This person was not a client of our office.  She does not even have first hand knowledge of an alleged phone call. In my first 3 days as a client, Attorney Khouri had sent several emails on my behalf, made several demands and had talked with me on the phone a dozen times and kept in constant contact between email and text messages. This kind of attorney is very, very rare. I would recommend Attorney Khouri to family and friends without hesitation.

Yes,  Mr Khouri represented my ex,  a physician,  and both of these men lied in public and in court. Mr Khouri is the perfect example of every bad attorney joke. These young people are rude,  hostile,  and ignorant of the law.  I had a single attorney.  My ex had 8 attorneys creating billable hours and I suffered absolute emotional abuse while these learned attorneys dragged the divorce out for five years.
I am writing a book about the fiasco and chaos instigated by Khouri,  et al. I have had support from numerous attorneys and therapists to confirm the torture created by Khouri. On Saturday morning, Attorney Khouri returned our call, listen to my situation with the utmost concern, and agreed to represent me. He was at my home on the following Monday and we discussed everything that could possibly happen. He was also very understanding regarding payment. Everything Attorney Khouri advised to me that would happen did. reviews.text: First I'd like to say that this review is about three months overdue! He never kept us in the dark about any of the process of selling our home of 28 years. There were many details in the process of the sale of our home, that I feel confident that if we had used another real estate attorney the outcome would not have been a very pleasant one, but with Steve’s integrity those thoughts never entered our minds. Steve is someone who we will always think of as part of our family, even though we have never met him in person, and that is also something we don’t take for granted.  If we could give Steve a hundred stars that wouldn’t be enough in our book!  So if you’re looking to sale your home or are going through any type of hardship in regards to your home Steve Doan is the man for you! Dear Manning Law Firm,

I wanted to take a moment to express my heartfelt gratitude for the exceptional legal representation and support your firm provided. I am truly thankful to the Manning brothers, Joe and Mike Manning, for establishing such a highly regarded firm.

Joe Manning, the founder of Manning Law, has built a firm known for its professionalism, expertise, and unwavering dedication. The reputation of your firm speaks volumes about Joe's visionary leadership and deep understanding of the legal landscape. I am sincerely appreciative of the solid foundation he has established.

I would also like to acknowledge Mike Manning, whose invaluable experience and legal knowledge contribute significantly to the firm's success. As a trusted friend and brother to Joe for 40 years, his presence strengthens Manning Law.

Furthermore, I extend my gratitude to the entire team at Manning Law Firm. From the paralegals to the administrative staff, everyone has shown exceptional professionalism and expertise. The seamless coordination and collaboration within your firm demonstrate a high level of dedication to your clients.

While I had an overall positive experience, I would like to provide some constructive criticism regarding my specific case. There was an attorney who caused significant delays, almost up to the statute of limitations, before taking action. Considering my case was on a contingency basis, this waiting period caused some concern, as the fee agreement is time-dependent. This experience left me questioning the reasons behind such a delay, although I ultimately settled my case. However, I believe it could have settled with better results. If an attorney is too busy to handle a case promptly, it would be advisable not to have a client sign a retainer without ensuring timely progress.

Despite this isolated incident, I firmly believe in the strength of the Manning Law Firm as a whole. One subpar experience should not overshadow the collective expertise and professionalism offered by your firm. Therefore, I still highly recommend Manning Law to anyone seeking legal assistance.

Thank you once again for your outstanding service.

Sincerely,

Jan Koren

Upon completion of the process, we are comfortable and assured everything is taken care of legally for any situation that might occur in the future. At ease does not even begin to describe how both my husband and I feel about our future needs and how they will impact our family.

If we had to narrow down our recommendation for Fenelli Law it would be excellence and compassion. For those of us with non-legal backgrounds, the entire process was quick, detailed, all-encompassing and financially affordable.

We highly recommend Fenelli Law Firm for all your estate planning needs.

This law firm is professional and very knowledgeable about estate planning. We have known them for years and watched the firm grow. We recently updated our trust and the recommendations were well received, ideas we hadn’t thought about. We now feel very confident that our wishes will be carried out if something should happen to us.

The Fenelli firm have been working with us for 20 years.
I would highly recommend them

He was able to explain the legal and tax consequences of improper or poor estate planning in layman's terms. His seminar was very helpful in helping understand the importance of proper estate planning. He is warm and personable and has a legal network of professionals that he works with. His office is very hospitable and welcoming. His daughters who are also attorneys specializing in estate planning are also very hospitable. I would highly recommend Rick Fenelli and his daughters to anyone seeking to complete their estate planning. Rick's book was also very informative and helpful in explaining the consequences of not having your living trust done properly.

reviews.ownerResponse: Please know your complaint was immediately investigated, including a review of all written communications and interview with staff. Further, the staff member involved is a kind young man who recently graduated college. He is emphatic that he would never demean or speak poorly to anyone, particularly someone who he mentioned seemed upset and combative. While I cannot say for sure what happened during this call, I will note that this young man seems genuine, caring, and deeply concerned by your allegation. I suspect there is confusion on your end as to what recommendations have been made and that in your anger you attributed a response to someone that they did not intend to make. I ask that you carefully review our prior written recommendations and to return our call to discuss this matter.

reviews.text: George Vargas was a man of hope and diligence to me at a time when my options appeared limited and the likelihood of a satisfactory resolution seemed nearly impossible. Not only was he able to defend me from unjust accusation and alleged charges, but his calm, empathetic and professional demeanor offered emotional ease to myself and those who battled this journey with me. Despite what may have appeared as a standard DUI on my arrest record, my specific case was far from that.  Given the challenges and uniqueness of my case, it required someone who not only possessed experience in the DUI case arena, but it also required someone who wasn't going to rest until my justice and my acquittal was certain.  George was that lawyer whom I needed.  I know I had many sleepless nights as a result of the arrest--in addition to my life substantially being placed on hold, but George stuck with me and assured me throughout the tenure of the case that everything was going to be okay and made me feel at ease with positivity and hopefulness.  It was obvious rather early that the DA wasn't going to let me off easy, so George and I geared up for Trial despite the attempts to mitigate the charges.  It was evident that he becomes just as passionate as you do about the case and will do what he can for you throughout all proceedings.  He fought tooth and nail and used his professionalism and passion to carry me to victory.  I am eternally grateful for his service and I recommend Mr. Vargas for any of your judicial needs.  He is truly a great representative, a great lawyer and a great person and friend.  Thank you George, I truly appreciate everything you've done for me!
reviews.ownerResponse: Justin thanks for the kind words and for putting your future in my hands.  I was honored to represent you in light of all you do for our community.  You deserved the NOT GUILTY verdict from the jury.   I know that you are going to make the most of it and have a great career keeping California safe.  I am confident that in the future you will be careful to avoid those situations..  Call me next time you visit Southern California and we can get lunch.

reviews.text: I used George for a marijuana case. I was faced with a 6 figure fine and several liens on my property. George was able to get the fine down to less than 10% of the original amount and all the liens removed. I would use George again. He doesn't blow smoke and does produce results.

I had an unusually complicated legal matter and was referred to Ralph. A highly skilled professional on all counts, he took my case not as a challenge, but rather as a routine piece of business! As I would come to find out, his balance of superb legal skills, disarming social presence and cunning intellect, (a rare combination of Dale Carnegie and Thor's Hammer) would make all the difference in obtaining a positive result.

We were incredibly fortunate to be referred to Ralph by a friend. We were comfortable with him from the first meeting and got to know him pretty well as our case took over a year to resolve, through no fault of his. He was aggressive in his pursuit of a favorable resolution, and he is quick to respond no matter how he's contacted. We were truly impressed, not only with his vast knowledge of our options, but with his ability to clearly communicate them to us. He has a commanding presence which was quite intimidating to opposing counsel and their client, but also has a disarming smile which can calm everyone down during a heated mediation. His sense of humor made downtime during meditations lively and enjoyable. We weren't always sure his strategies would work, but we trusted him despite our fears and we were right to do so. We won our case handily and are thrilled to have it behind us. Mr. Martinez is not the cheapest out there - but he is worth every single penny. We still talk about how lucky we were to have him. He will have your back!

I really liked that he didn't try to insist that he do and charge me accordingly.  I will remember him for ANY other type of problem I have in real estate/title.  Thanks again for your help!

Jeff was referred to me by another lawyer. There was not much information on him, or any reviews, but I decided to give him a try anyways. reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear B. D.,

We are sorry you feel this way. Unfortunately, I have no records of a "B.D." being a client if mine. Are you sure I was your attorney? There are no words that can express my gratitude for The Law Offices of Dr. Bruce G. Fagel and Associates. In 2015, my child almost died due to medical negligence and malpractice. I knew the medical staff needed to be held accountable for what happened to my 3-year-old son, but I wasn’t sure if I had a legal case. I did my research and called this firm, within an hour I was speaking with Dr. Fagel. From that moment forward, I had a champion in our corner. We met and went over everything that happened to my son. The firm was caring, listened to me (the parent), and agreed to take the case. Over the next few years the team worked diligently on our case. My son’s case ended up going to jury trial, it was quite an experience. Thinking back on how Dr. Fagel advocated for my son in that courtroom for weeks brings tears to my eyes. They were so supportive and gave me the courage to get justice for my son. For me, having a voice and holding those accountable is what mattered the most. It was complicated, but in the end we won. If you need someone in your corner for medical malpractice, this is the only firm that I would recommend. I will be forever thankful the Fagels took our case, and someday when he is old enough to know about the mighty legal warriors that fought for him, my son will be thankful as well.

Our son was involved in a very unfortunate malpractice case with a large medical group a couple of years ago. I knew immediately after his diagnosis that the state of his health could have been avoided and that I needed legal counsel. One of my biggest fears in pursuing any legal recourse was finding a firm to take our case due to the size and prominence of that facility. My Mother-in-law had served as a juror on a trial Dr. Fagel prosecuted nearly 15 years earlier. She described him as fierce and captivating and the guy you want in your corner in the event you need it. She urged me to look him up to see if he was still in practice. Luckily, he was. I still remember the peace that overcame me when my husband and I met Bron that day in the cafeteria of the hospital. He patiently listened as we recounted our story, went over all our questions, concerns and provided insight on what to expect from that moment on. I couldn’t believe it; my mother-in-law was right! We were in good hands! During our case, we worked closely with Dr. Fagel, Ed Asencio and Silvana who will always have a piece of my heart. For three years he and his legal assistant knew us on a first name basis. They were always readily available to take my calls answering questions, providing guidance and support to what a very uncertain and daunting time was. They equipped us with information and resources I never thought I would need and for that, to them, I am forever grateful. We are very pleased with the outcome of our case and would absolutely recommend Dr. Fagel. There is no dollar amount you can put on a life. No amount of money can undo your experience and outcome. But having this team on your side, carrying out justice on your behalf, makes the experience easier.

A medical Mal-practice law suit isn't something my family ever hoped for. Unfortunately grave mistakes were made during the birth of our child, that absolutely turned our world upside down. The Law Offices of Dr. Bruce G. Fagel & Associates helped us see the gravity of the damages we had before us and the ones that were yet to come. We were confident from day one that Mr. Ascensio had our Childs best interest in mind. He and his team did extensive research and put us in contact with very reputable professionals. I was most impressed with the responsiveness of his assistant Silvana. She always returned our calls and answered all our questions.  No amount of money could ever replace our child or the family we were supposed to have. But thanks to their hard work and diligence we had a successful outcome. They put us in a position were we could cover her extensive medical expenses, provide her with all the care she needed, and restore a little bit of normality in our lives. All in all we are grateful to them and we feel we chose the right Law office to represent our family.

Anyone dealing with trauma knows what it's like when you're heartbroken, grieving and shattered; that's why I'm grateful that Dr. Fagel and team were there for us during our hardest times and represented our medical malpractice case.  From the moment I called, they showed compassion and were prompt at returning all my emails and phone calls.

During the legal process, I was given long-term scenarios, medical advice, we sought additional specialists and offered a team of medical resources.  I appreciated how patient, informative and clear, Dr. Fagel had been, while providing us a thorough, long term medical care and cost time line.

While working with Dr. Fagel and team, I've never felt rushed, I was always treated respectably, my feedback continuously valued and most importantly, they made me feel, like mine and my families well beings were paramount.

I'm sure Dr. Fagel's office has an influx of phone calls so it's disheartening to see all the negative reviews. I can only share my experience.  For the last few year I've been and will always be grateful for the Law Offices of Dr. Fagel and associates.

Was told their case load is too high so they can't help me. Why are they still advertising then? Why doesn't their website state that? Why are there no other reviews?  Can't they update their own information?  They stated that they got back to me in an email from a questionnaire I filled out on their website but they actually didn't get back to me at all. Highly recommend!!!

Wow never come across a worse firm. Heard Mark Kohler on multiple interviews and podcasts and he sounded like an expert for real estate taxes (and I'm sure he is if you're a high roller and can get him to actually be your CPA but it's impossible). I can only speak to his CPA firm he runs but honestly I'd be surprised if it's even his firm and not just his name on a door. I tried to become a client, HUGE mistake.

DO NOT DO IT!! They're not knowledgeable on real estate tax's and will convince you to pay $1,200 for a diagram fee, ask you to upload your tax documents and situation so they can get a lay of the land, then they won't review it and just hop on a 60 minute call to talk in circles about trusts, 401k's, IRA's and if you don't have those then they upsell you their services to create them all. Didn't even listen to your unique situation and prioritize when certain things need to happen.

Bottom Line: if your taxes are fairly simple and straightforward I'm sure this firm will be fine and you'll think nothing less. But then again my advise is if your tax's are simple then also don't go here b/c it's 5x the cost what an average CPA charges to file your tax returns. Educate yourself and don't get swooned like I did.
Knowledgeable

The information I was provided about opening a self directed IRA and 401K was priceless. My attorney was very knowledgeable and attentive.  He addressed all concerns related to protecting my investment.  Anyone interested in going this route should contact this firm. They receive my highest recommendation.

I incurred a work injury but I did not "immediately" realize that the numerous "sudden & unusual symptoms" that I was experiencing was actually caused by my work situation. Then I naively attempted to navigate the Work Comp process myself, thinking my employer would do the right thing by me since I had been an excellent employee for many years. My injuries were a number of physical manifestations as a result of prolonged "overwork" and "extreme stress" due to the work situation. This type of case is the most difficult to prosecute.  Because of these components when I did finally realize that I needed a lawyer, no attorney would take the case. I was physically unwell, emotionally distraught, in financial hardship from the injury and missed work AND I was still working in the exact same "overwork and stressful" work situation that caused the injury to begin with. I was just barely hanging on. Mr. Farhad responded to my phone call, heard my situation and had the courage to take this case. If you are reading this review, do not hesitate.  Call immediately for representation.  I did not pay anything up front.  Calling attorneys was scary and difficult (for me at least). I didn't know what to do, how much a lawyer would cost, I was injured, embarrassed by the whole situation, emotionally traumatized by it all, overwhelmed, I was in financial hardship by this point and so on.  Having to tell the story and the entire series of events to tons of lawyers I contacted was taxing on me. That is where I was, at least, by the time Mr. Khojasteh agreed to take my case. I cried but out of relief that someone was going to try to help me. He was my Angel and a Godsend. My employer was not going to compensate me for anything, tried to shut the case multiple times, and "purposefully" overwhelmed me by burying me in their paperwork which I have since learned is a "tactic" used to get the injured party to just give up or knowing that the injured party is in no "state" to be able to "keep up with it all" and reply by their deadlines, ect. When Mr. Farhad began representing me, he took care of "EVERYTHING". No more WC letters came to me. All communications were handled by Mr. Farhad. He took care of it all. There is nothing that can "really" compensate a person for an injury incurred, especially if there is long-term "Permanente" damage; however, receiving compensation DOES matter and make a difference. Mr. Farhad Khojasteh successfully won me regular Work Comp payments which helped out financially as we worked through the case, he successfully won me a final settlement payout, and he protected my employment status which were all things that I did not have prior to his representation. Do not make the mistakes that I did. If you are reading this review, do not hesitate. Call Mr. Farhad Khojasteh today. Thank you so much, Mr. Khojasteh. Thank you for taking my case and fighting for me!! -- Sincerely, Belinda

I am not satisfied with the way the law firm Don Session has handled my case. In 2022, my employer owed me two months of salary, so I went to the law office of Session & Kimball. I met with attorney Samuel Nielson am not satisfied with the way the law firm Don Session has handled my case. In 2022, my employer owed me two months of salary, so I went to the law office of Session & Kimball. I met with attorney Samuel Nielsen, and after reviewing my documents, he agreed to represent me.

After attorney Samuel left the firm, I spoke with attorney Don Session, who assured me that he would continue handling my case. However, after several months of waiting, I called the office to ask for an update. To my surprise, the secretary told me that my case had been closed. I asked why I had never received any notice or form informing me of this. Later, Mr. Sisson called me back and apologized, saying he had confused my case with another client’s.

I had been waiting for a court hearing, as the other party had refused to pay. Mr. Sisson apologized again and said he had been busy with other cases. I was very disappointed, because all I needed was for him to schedule an appointment with the DLSE to continue the case. Instead, he tried to negotiate with my employer but failed to obtain any payment.

From 2022 until now, Mr. Sisson has told me that the other party still refuses to pay, and that the firm could only negotiate for them to pay half. However, he also said that if I did not accept that offer, they would no longer represent me.

After more than three years, I feel that this law firm has acted irresponsibly. They did not keep their promises, and I have been waiting all this time without resolution. Since attorney Samuel Nissen left the firm and my case was transferred to Mr. Don Sisson, it has been treated carelessly and without proper attention. After 3 years from 2022 to present he  refuse to represent me.

Oh, look—another company that claims one thing and practices another, just like my previous employers that Sessions & Kimball LLP clearly lacks the spine, ethics, intelligence and integrity to stand up against. Do not believe what is written on their webpage: if you have a mental health disability, and you have undeniable proof of its abuse—in addition to other state and federal violations of the law—it doesn't matter. All they care about are optics, just like every other frivolous and profit-hungry hippo that sees humans as transactional units to trade and utilize as needed.

I contacted this law firm over a week ago, have email communications with a paralegal (whom I thought would've had the decency to email me back given their claim of sharing one of my disorders as well), and lo and behold, Heidi clearly can't handle what she read since she asked me to provide her with all of my 150+ emails on Sep. 3, 2025 for review after our consultation that day. It took her until Sep. 15, 2025 to confirm her decision to deny it, despite having the cleanest evidence (that no other firm has even asked to see btw, so that's dubious).

Don't waste your time with them: I'm already moving on, with four separate state and federal complaints filed, and continuing to contact additional law firms when I have the energy to do so, because in addition to dealing with immorality and illegality, I'm still also having to figure out ways to support myself in a country and society whose systemic neglect, ignorance and stupidity toward mental health education and human rights remains egregiously harmful, backward, and pathetic. Clearly, people need a major educational lesson on mental health, but I'm not about to go on a lecture here; there's better platforms for me to do that on in the future.

I couldn't care less if every law firm lacks the intelligence and backbone to stand their ground against immoralities: I don't need nor desire such weaklings in my presence. I'll represent myself, I'll advocate for myself, and I'll defend myself to prove that my peers and I have rights, and are often far better workers (and humans) than the "normal" people who abuse us. You people are the REAL problem in this world, not me—you're just mad that I'm shining a blacklight in your dark and dirty rooms. Well, get ready: the world's got a big storm comin' once I share my story. I refuse to co-create a Catch-22 world that continues to cry for change and then chastises the very people fighting for change. Idiotic cowardice is embarrassingly appalling.

I hope this review helps you in deciding to have the team at Sessions & Kimball LLP represent and truly advocate for you, as they did for me. I had the pleasure of working with Stephen Kimball and Bruce Lee, and my experience with them was nothing short of excellent.

Their professionalism, expertise, integrity, and guidance throughout the entire process made me feel vindicated even before my case officially closed. They were thorough, dedicated, and committed to providing not only a fair and successful resolution, but also lasting reassurance and encouragement.

More than justice, they gave me closure and peace and for that, I am forever grateful. I highly and respectfully recommend their services.

I had the pleasure of working with Larry Herrera and cannot speak highly enough of his professionalism, legal expertise, and dedication to his clients. From our initial consultation, it was clear that Larry possesses a deep understanding of the law and a strong commitment to achieving the best possible outcomes.

He took the time to listen carefully to my concerns, explain complex legal concepts in a clear and approachable manner, and develop a thoughtful strategy tailored to my specific situation. Throughout the process, Larry was consistently responsive, thorough, and proactive in keeping me informed every step of the way.

His integrity, attention to detail, and client-first approach made a difficult situation much more manageable. I always felt that my case was in capable hands, and the results reflected that.

I would highly recommend Larry Herrera to anyone in need of a knowledgeable and trustworthy attorney in Orange County. He is a true professional and an exceptional advocate.

They kept me in the communication loop consistently and their guidance through the process was spot on.  I could not have been more pleased with the results and I'd highly recommend their services to all my friends, family and colleagues.

But I contacted Sessions and Kimball, spoke to Sam Nielson who was honest and straightforward with his insights right from the beginning. He listened carefully with an empathetic ear, was willing to help me and gave me hope to have the right legal representation to fight for my situation.
The attorneys met with me within just a few days, they made me feel comfortable and important.
Upon listening to my testimony, they accepted my case.
Throughout the entire case Sam kept me informed of the progress with realistic expectations as well as making sure I knew I was his highest priority. The end result of the case showed the effectiveness of his negotiations and that I was important to him as a person.
I highly recommend Sessions and Kimball to anyone. Sam defended my case with determination, he treated me with respect and looked for my best interest. He has earned my trust and respect.
I could not have picked a better law firm to come to in such a trying time of my life.
I hope to never be in the same situation but if I do, I would definitely come to Sessions and Kimball once again.
I am grateful for the opportunity to have a new beginning in my life.
Thank you for all you did for me, respectfully.

They were great. Sam (one of the attorneys) at Sessions & Kimball LLP spent an hour with me (complimentary) to help me understand an employment contract. I would recommend them to anyone with any questions related to their employment contract and other labor related questions!

Honest and knowledgeable. Very up front about their expectations and the like. I’ll keep you posted as time progresses here. I initially started out with 5 stars...now I'm livid! Everything I was told in the beginning signing up with them has spiraled downward in a bad way. The person I was working with is no longer there and this has pretty much been a waste of 3 years. What do you do when you are promised the moon and get nothing but a pebble? I came to this firm with high expectations via a referral. My referral source has since passed away but either way expectations and promises all a big fluff. Hugely disappointed to say the least. I actually work for attorneys and I have never seen something so overpromised and underdelivered. Unfortunately, the attorneys I work for do not do this type of law but being in the industry I know what should have been said and done and I believed what I was told here. Watch for the final update. To be continued...

I contacted attorney Herrera and explained my employment law situation. He told me he hasn't reviewed the fair chance act for over a year but would be willing to help me out and to send him an email with my correspondence with an employer. He then called me back and stated that he would not be able to help me with my case. I asked him why and he provided no answer or even a referral to someone who could help me. This firm employs an attorney who is both incompetent and unprofessional I would not advise using them for any services.

After several months of trying to find a firm that would take my ADA discrimination case, I was set to do an EEOC mediation on my own without representation. About a week prior to my appointment, I found attorney Sam Neilson with Sessions & Kimball. Sam agreed to be there for my mediation and represent me -  just in the knick of time!  I don't know what I would've done without him by my side. Working with him was very comfortable and easy. I didn't receive the monetary outcome I had hoped for, but having Sam there helped me reach a settlement. If I ever have any employment legal issues in the future, I'll be contacting this firm.
Excellent law firm, extremely helpful. Highly recommend Mr. Nielson and the team at Sessions & Kimball.
This firm is beyond expectations. From their wonderful receptionists to their lawyers. Sam was beyond personable and kind. Definitely recommend them for any legal matters.

reviews.text: Never heard back from them from my inquiry on their website.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Paul,

We sincerely apologize to have missed your web inquiry. It appears to have come while our receptionist was away and been lost amid additional inquiries that followed upon her return. Per our voicemail to you two weeks ago, we remain happy to speak with you and discuss your situation.

reviews.text: I’m still waiting for their call back unfortunately, they might need an entire customer service department!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Echoing the response of other employment law firms “reviewed” by MU, this review seems to be from a competitor intent on harming our reputation as well as those of other firms. The reviewer’s profile shows a sudden deluge of reviews within a narrow timeframe and no more reviews since that time. Five of those reviews are for law firms in Orange County, and each law-firm review states basically the same thing of alleged poor customer service.

The reviewer also lacks a real name, and we have no record of anyone with the initials “MU” contacting our firm and not receiving a call from one of our attorneys.

We are a unique firm in that those contacting our office will have their inquiry reviewed by an attorney and receive a response from that attorney. So if this review comes from a real person with a real inquiry, then we invite that person to contact our office at 949-380-0900 to discuss their employment matter with one of our attorneys.

reviews.text:
If you are reading this review, you are probably considering taking legal action against an employer for unfair or illegal actions against you.  My advice is to do it:  Speak with an attorney.  You likely will feel better.  I waited too long, but the minute I took action, I felt better.  Some employers do awful things and should be held accountable.  Otherwise, they will keep doing them.

If you do decide to take action, in my opinion, Sam Nielson of Sessions & Kimball is an outstanding choice.  I had never taken legal action before and was skeptical of lawyers, especially plaintiffs’ lawyers.  But the minute I met Sam, I liked him and knew I had made the right choice.  He is a nice guy and changed my view of lawyers completely.  He is ethical and sympathetic.   He is truly a pleasure to work with.

But don’t let his kindness fool you:  He knows the law and aggressively seeks justice for his clients.  My case went to mediation, which Sam handled masterfully.  Had we gone to trial, I am certain he would have been outstanding.  His paralegal Trevor was also a pleasure to work with.
At the conclusion of my case, Sam was even kind enough to speak with my two sons who are considering careers in law.

I can’t imagine a better employment attorney than Sam Nielson at Sessions & Kimball.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks, Roy, for your thoughtful review and appreciation of our work. We are so happy to have helped you achieve justice!

reviews.text: Sam Nielson was representing me and he was so professional and responsive.  He acted immediately when I needed him to, and I really felt like he had my back and was fighting for me. He was able to handle my situation efficiently and promptly… definitely recommend Sam and this firm!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks, Lisa, for your kind words and trusting us to vindicate your rights!

Thank you for being dependable and honest, I am beyond grateful to Eric!

I was not just looking for any attorney, I needed someone to really listen to my concern and to assure me that the right thing would be done under the law. Nicole would allow me to call her anytime I had an issue or question even after normal hours. If she was not available I left a message and she would call me right back, you rarely see that in a attorney. If you are looking for just any attorney, they are a dime a dozen and will tell you what you want to hear. If you are looking for someone to fight for you because your employer has done you wrong, then Nicole at Sessions & Kimball is who you should align yourself with. I have told a few people about Nicole and they too have gotten great results as well.

Eric Lystrup was beyond helpful and went out of his way to help get me the advice I needed for my specific situation.  In the past, I have reached out to other attorneys and have not received such quality insight and responsiveness.  Eric will remain on my list of valuable resources & I will definitely refer!

I have sat on both sides of the table when it comes to employment law matters, mostly as an employer representative, and had a tremendous respect for Sessions Kimball based on past experiences as an employer. Mrs trejo nos ayudo  con  la custodia de mi nieta estoy muy contenta  por su buen trabajo  si en algun momento yo ocuparia su servisio no dudaria en  obter su ayuda nuebamente  yo les recomiendo ala Abogada  Juana Trejo muy buena abogada en casos de familia.

reviews.text: Alex and his talented team assisted me with a lawsuit that stemmed from one of the worst days of my life.  They were incredibly kind to my needs and situation.  I was impressed with their knowledge of the law and how to resolve my issue.  12/10 I would recommend to anyone needing legal assistance. I'm glad to see so many positive reviews for this firm because my experience was positive. Unlike most other claimants with serious accident injuries, my physical injury was quite minor, despite my motorcycle being totaled by a freeway rear-end collision. But the good fortune of minor injury brings two problems: the liable party's insurance company feels they can just walk away, and few lawyers want to take a case that's going to net them a couple thousand. I am thrilled and grateful that A G Assanti wanted to take my case without an instant's hesitation. I was handled with efficiency, concern and professionalism with a final result 5 times the insurer's first offer.

I suspect a lot of people get in an accident, particularly one like mine that's 100% the fault of the other party, and think that one call to a lawyer is going to make it rain money. Those are the stories we read in the media, right? Someone fell off a ladder and got millions for it? While I was engaged in this matter I was a jurist on an injury trial. A city bus turned into the path of an older but fit bicyclist, knocking him to the ground, breaking his hip, and permanently degrading the rest of his life with pain and mobility limitations. Two people on that jury took the position, "Ride a busy street, those are the chances you take. Zero compensation." That's the reality of taking your case to a jury. Getting even a fair jury settlement is a risky uphill battle that's a lot of hard work.

With my one-stitch injury we weren't going to go there, and no doubt the insurer knew it. They wanted to pay for my jacket and helmet and walk away, leaving me without my only transportation, and without one of the central joys of my life. A G Assanti made sure that did not happen.

I've had Alex as my attorney for a number of years now.  He helped me through my divorce and in gaining full custody of my children from my abusive ex-husband.  Alex goes above and beyond for his clients and makes sure that you have the best of the best in the courtroom.  He's aggressive and doesn't give up.  He makes sure his clients are protected.  I wouldn't trust my families safety with anyone else.  He truly cares about his clients.

I've worked with Assanti & Associates on an accident case. The other party was very shady. Alex, came up with a very smart strategy and followed it through. He helped me  avoid a situation that would have added insult to injury and eventually caused the other party to withdraw their claims. Alex and his staff were pleasant and professional. It was a pleasure working with them and I would trust them with any other matters in the future.
